name: Rand Paul
subject: Say you're with me, Fellow Conservative
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Dear Fellow Conservative:

The establishment's pick for the Republican
nomination just attacked me for fighting to stop the
out-of-control NSA's ILLEGAL bulk data collection on American
citizens!

I'm sure the press will pile on. I'm sure
Big Government spy state apologists on BOTH sides of the aisle
will join in.

Fellow Conservative, the attacks only mean the pressure
is working - and your voice is being heard!

The entire Senate is in disarray, and there's
no telling what the surveillance state insiders will try to pull
over the next few days.

But one thing is certain: I'm NOT backing
down! And I hope you won't, either.

Will you stand with me in the fight to end
illegal spying?

In the lead up to the fight to renew these
illegal bulk data collection programs, I've drafted a series of
amendments.

By far the most important is my amendment to
FORCE an end to all bulk collection of data by the NSA.

I've also drafted an amendment to ensure
third parties who break agreements with their users and share
data with the government will no longer get immunity.

And, I plan to introduce an amendment which
will finally stop "sneak and peak" searches of Americans' private
property without a warrant.

But Fellow Conservative, don't be fooled by what you hear
in the press.

My amendment is the ONLY legislation that
ENDS all unconstitutional and illegal collection of the American
people's phone records. PERIOD.

The House-passed bill is no solution.

I'm afraid it's designed to keep the worst of
the NSA's spying programs operating with fig-leaf reforms.

I will not stand by and allow Americans'
personal records to be collected and stored one moment longer.

I will not back down.

I will do everything in my power to ensure
the Fourth Amendment -- which protects Americans' right to
privacy from government -- is fully restored.

And the fact is, I'm being attacked right now
because the Big Government establishment fears the momentum is
with you and me.

But it's critical you continue to stand with
me.

Please help me continue to keep the heat on
the U.S. Senate!

Chip in $10
immediately >>

Chip in $25
immediately >>

Chip in $50
immediately >>

Chip in $100
immediately >>

Or donate another
amount >>

In Liberty,

Rand Paul

Paid for by Rand Paul for President

name: Ben Carson
subject: This is the last chance...
body:
| [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/27916436:26849159458:m:1:876315805:61B9E0CE29388E7E5EFF29F81175A944:r)
---
|

Time is running out Peter.

[**Saturday, May 23, will be the last day to enter our 'Lunch With Ben' contest.**](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/27916436:26849159458:m:1:876315805:61B9E0CE29388E7E5EFF29F81175A944:r)

My campaign will be flying our winner and one guest to Dallas, Texas to join me for lunch on May 30, and I'm really looking forward to it.

[**To be automatically entered, please donate $5 or more to Carson America now**](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/27916436:26849159458:m:1:876315805:61B9E0CE29388E7E5EFF29F81175A944:r)**.

| [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/27916436:26849159458:m:1:876315805:61B9E0CE29388E7E5EFF29F81175A944:r)
---
**
Running for President requires meeting a lot of people without a lot of time, and I'm thrilled for this opportunity to really get to know a couple of my supporters.**

**[**If you haven't yet donated $5 or more to enter our contest, I hope you will do so now. There's only about 24 hours to go.**](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/27916436:26849159458:m:1:876315805:61B9E0CE29388E7E5EFF29F81175A944:r)

Thanks for your continued support.

Sincerely,

Ben Carson

**

****

NO PAYMENT OR CONTRIBUTION OF ANY KIND IS REQUIRED TO WIN THIS CONTEST** and any payment or contribution will not increase your odds of winning this contest. You may enter contest without donating by [clicking here](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/27916437:26849159458:m:1:876315805:61B9E0CE29388E7E5EFF29F81175A944:r). The FULL OFFICIAL RULES for "LUNCH WITH BEN" [can be read here](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/27916438:26849159458:m:1:876315805:61B9E0CE29388E7E5EFF29F81175A944:r). One winner, randomly chosen by the committee will receive the following prize: Roundtrip airfare for winner and a guest to Dallas, Texas, transportation, lunch at a location of the committee's choosing, and one night in a hotel. The contest is open to citizens of any of the 50 states, Puerto Rico and the District of Columbia, and permanent residents who hold green cards, who are 18 years or older or have reached the age of majority as defined by state law. This contest is sponsored by Carson America. Void where prohibited. The Commonwealth of Virginia is the jurisdiction for resolution of any legal challenges.

name: Senator Lindsey Graham
subject: Memorial Day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Security Through Strength
body:
| |
[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/27942887:26855870642:m:1:877327319:F8820D18E9A6218DC00E1182B386A836:r)
---
---
|
Friend,

This weekend marks an important moment of remembrance. Living in a country as great as ours, we occasionally take our basic freedoms and liberties for granted. On a whim, we can voice our opinions, pray to an Almighty God, and decide who will lead our country.

**But those freedoms are not free. They are paid with the sacrifice of more than two centuries of patriots who gave their lives to protect ours.**

To undertake such a sacrifice to protect our home, our beliefs, and our freedom is part of our civic culture. We can never forget what millions of service men and women gave up for us.

Where American men have defended us, whether in the blistering cold of Valley Forge; or at Normandy, on Mount Suribachi, or in Baghdad, we stood together to support them. This weekend marks another occasion to stand together and remember.

**This Memorial Day, we continue to honor the heroes who paid the ultimate price in defense of our values, freedom and homeland.** Our debt to them will always be innumerable and impossible to fully repay.

May God Bless you and continue to bless the United States of America.

Sincerely,

Senator Lindsey Graham

|

| Paid for by Security Through Strength

---

This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)

name: Doug Stafford
subject: zero
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Fellow Conservative,

ZERO . . . ZILCH . . . NONE . . . NADA.

According to a report just issued by the
Justice Department's Inspector General, that's the number of
terrorist attacks prevented by the NSA's illegal spying program.

Yet that hasn't stopped the FBI from tripling
the amount of data they've "snooped" out of the NSA's illegal
bulk collection program.

Fellow Conservative, this gross violation of personal
liberty is just one example of why Rand's amendment to FORCE an
end to all bulk collection data by the NSA is so important.

And it's why your support is so critical at
this time. So can I count on you to Stand with Rand as he stares
down the NSA?

Because Rand's amendment is the ONLY
legislation that ENDS all unconstitutional and illegal collection
of the American people's phone records, he's under fire from the
Big Government establishment.

But I can assure you, Fellow Conservative, Rand WILL NOT
back down from this fight -- no matter how ugly it gets.

When he took an oath to protect and defend
the Constitution of the United States, he meant it.

But Rand is just one man and he's fighting
the entire Washington Machine.

There's only so much he can do.

But when Rand goes toe-to-toe with the
surveillance state this weekend, having YOU -- along with tens of
thousands of other freedom-loving Americans by his side -- will
be a constant reminder to his colleagues that the American people
have had enough.

So today, Fellow Conservative, can I count on you to add
your name and Stand with Rand?

-- Doug Stafford
Chief Strategist

Paid for by Rand Paul for President

name: Alex Conant, MarcoRubio.com
subject: NY Times
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for President |
body:
---
Peter, Please take a moment and read [this article](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/42172635:17192508284:m:1:1349778030:F015B037C860C954A5A19A2E0E2A6BFA:r) that just posted at the _New York Times_. Hillary Clinton's campaign is reportedly "unnerved" by Marco Rubio's "powerful story" and worried he will beat her in a general election match up. According to the _Times_ , "even former President Bill Clinton is said to worry that Mr. Rubio could become the Republican nominee." They know this election will be about the future, and Hilary Clinton is **yesterday**. Marco is offering an agenda for a New American Century. [Please read the full article](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/42172635:17192508284:m:1:1349778030:F015B037C860C954A5A19A2E0E2A6BFA:r) and then [_**click here and donate $13, $11, $7 or whatever you can afford before you leave for Memorial Day weekend.**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/42172636:17192508284:m:1:1349778030:F015B037C860C954A5A19A2E0E2A6BFA:r) With enough donations from people like you, Marco will defeat Clinton and win this election. [_**Please click here now.**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/42172636:17192508284:m:1:1349778030:F015B037C860C954A5A19A2E0E2A6BFA:r) Alex Conant
Communications Director
Marco Rubio for President **[_P.S. Donate more than $5 now and you'll be automatically entered in our contest to join Marco in Las Vegas for his birthday party next Thursday!_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/42172637:17192508284:m:1:1349778030:F015B037C860C954A5A19A2E0E2A6BFA:r)** __ __ __ __ __ __
* * *
Read the first few paragraphs below
> "They use words like "historic" and "charismatic," phrases like "great potential" and "million-dollar smile." They notice audience members moved to tears by an American-dream-come-true success story. When they look at the cold, hard political math, they get uneasy. An incipient sense of anxiety is tugging at some Democrats -- a feeling tersely captured in four words from a blog post written recently by a seasoned party strategist in Florida: "Marco Rubio scares me." What is so unnerving to them at this early phase of the 2016 presidential campaign still seems, at worst, a distant danger: the prospect of a head-to-head general-election contest between Mr. Rubio, the Republican senator from Florida, and Hillary Rodham Clinton. Yet the worriers include some on Mrs. Clinton's team. And even former President Bill Clinton is said to worry that Mr. Rubio could become the Republican nominee, whittle away at Mrs. Clinton's support from Hispanics and jeopardize her chances of carrying Florida's vital 29 electoral votes."
[_The New York Times_ 5/22/15](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/42172635:17192508284:m:1:1349778030:F015B037C860C954A5A19A2E0E2A6BFA:r)

clean_body: Peter, Please take a moment and read that just posted at the New York Times. Hillary Clinton's campaign is reportedly "unnerved" by Marco Rubio's "powerful story" and worried he will beat her in a general election match up. According to the Times , "even former President Bill Clinton is said to worry that Mr. Rubio could become the Republican nominee." They know this election will be about the future, and Hilary Clinton is yesterday. Marco is offering an agenda for a New American Century. and then With enough donations from people like you, Marco will defeat Clinton and win this election. Alex Conant Communications Director Marco Rubio for President * Read the first few paragraphs below "They use words like "historic" and "charismatic," phrases like "great potential" and "million-dollar smile." They notice audience members moved to tears by an American-dream-come-true success story. When they look at the cold, hard political math, they get uneasy. An incipient sense of anxiety is tugging at some Democrats -- a feeling tersely captured in four words from a blog post written recently by a seasoned party strategist in Florida: "Marco Rubio scares me." What is so unnerving to them at this early phase of the 2016 presidential campaign still seems, at worst, a distant danger: the prospect of a head-to-head general-election contest between Mr. Rubio, the Republican senator from Florida, and Hillary Rodham Clinton. Yet the worriers include some on Mrs. Clinton's team. And even former President Bill Clinton is said to worry that Mr. Rubio could become the Republican nominee, whittle away at Mrs. Clinton's support from Hispanics and jeopardize her chances of carrying Florida's vital 29 electoral votes." name: Rand Paul
subject: I'm in for the long haul
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Fellow Conservative,

It's late on a holiday weekend.

But our fight to end illegal NSA spying is coming to a head, and it appears this fight may drag into the wee morning hours.

My filibuster will continue, but I need some extra muscle from the grassroots to keep it going.

Here's how you can help:

1.) Please **[stand with me](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/27948196:26862217322:m:1:879035888:CA8B2BA1C909FDAB11C7FF60B2A92D54:r)** in this fight by adding your name.

2.) Once you've joined my filibuster, please take a moment to forward this email to your friends and family members and ask them to stand with you and me in this fight by adding their name.

3.) Then I hope you'll please **[stand with me by chipping in a generous contribution](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/27948196:26862217322:m:1:879035888:CA8B2BA1C909FDAB11C7FF60B2A92D54:r)**. I could use your help right now like never before.

Thanks for all you do, Fellow Conservative.

In Liberty,

Rand Paul

P.S. By using Senate procedure, I'm fighting to delay Senators from voting on bills before the Memorial Day Weekend recess. The key showdown vote on NSA spying is expected at approximately 1 AM ET. Follow this link for a more detailed explanation: **[http://thehill.com/policy/national-security/243014-paul-pushes-senate-nsa-vote-after-midnight](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/27948197:26862217322:m:1:879035888:CA8B2BA1C909FDAB11C7FF60B2A92D54:r)**

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/27948198:26862217322:m:1:879035888:CA8B2BA1C909FDAB11C7FF60B2A92D54:r) [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/27948199:26862217322:m:1:879035888:CA8B2BA1C909FDAB11C7FF60B2A92D54:r)[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/27948200:26862217322:m:1:879035888:CA8B2BA1C909FDAB11C7FF60B2A92D54:r) Paid for by Rand Paul for President
